scripts.install:local: /bin/zsh -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.npm-global" && npm run build && npm install -g --prefix "$HOME/.npm-global" . && if ! grep -Fq "export PATH=\"$HOME/.npm-global/bin:$PATH\"" "$HOME/.zshrc" 2>/dev/null; then printf "\nexport PATH=\"$HOME/.npm-global/bin:$PATH\"\n" >> "$HOME/.zshrc"; fi'
scripts.test:src: npm run build && npm run test
